# Neuron

> A 6-layer composable agentic AI framework in Rust, built on four protocol traits and two cross-cutting interfaces.

## Getting Started

- [README](README.md)
- [Redesign Plan](NEURON-REDESIGN-PLAN.md)
- [Specs Index](SPECS.md)
- [Development Log](DEVELOPMENT-LOG.md)
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md)

Build and test:

- Build: `cargo build`
- Test: `cargo test --workspace`
- Clippy: `cargo clippy --workspace --all-features -- -D warnings`
- Docs: `cargo doc --workspace --no-deps`

## Reading Order

1. [Specs Index](SPECS.md)
2. [Architecture: 6-Layer Model](docs/book/src/architecture/layers.md)
3. [Architecture: Protocol Traits](docs/book/src/architecture/protocol-traits.md)
4. [Crate Map](docs/book/src/reference/crate-map.md)
5. [Redesign Plan (historical)](NEURON-REDESIGN-PLAN.md)

## Architecture

- [Layer 0 Handoff](docs/architecture/HANDOFF.md): Layer 0 implementation spec with trait signatures, type definitions, module structure, and layer definitions.
- [Composable Agentic Architecture](docs/architecture/composable-agentic-architecture.md): Design rationale for the 4 protocols + 2 interfaces model, gap analysis, and coverage map.
- [Platform Scope Mapping](docs/architecture/platform-scope-mapping.md): Where features live (Neuron vs platform vs external infra).
- [Agentic Decision Map v3](docs/architecture/agentic-decision-map-v3.md): Full design space covering all 23 architectural decisions.
- [Validation and Coordination](docs/architecture/validation-and-coordination.md): Validation and coordination patterns.

## Specs

- [00 — Vision and Non-Goals](specs/00-vision-and-non-goals.md)
- [01 — Architecture and Layering](specs/01-architecture-and-layering.md)
- [02 — Layer 0 Protocol Contract](specs/02-layer0-protocol-contract.md)
- [03 — Effects and Execution Semantics](specs/03-effects-and-execution-semantics.md)
- [04 — Operator Turn Runtime](specs/04-operator-turn-runtime.md)
- [05 — Orchestration Core](specs/05-orchestration-core.md)
- [06 — Composition Factory and Glue](specs/06-composition-factory-and-glue.md)
- [07 — State Core](specs/07-state-core.md)
- [08 — Environment and Credentials](specs/08-environment-and-credentials.md)
- [09 — Hooks Lifecycle and Governance](specs/09-hooks-lifecycle-and-governance.md)
- [10 — Secrets Auth Crypto](specs/10-secrets-auth-crypto.md)
- [11 — Testing Examples and Backpressure](specs/11-testing-examples-and-backpressure.md)
- [12 — Packaging Versioning and Umbrella Crate](specs/12-packaging-versioning-and-umbrella-crate.md)
- [13 — Documentation and DX Parity](specs/13-documentation-and-dx-parity.md)

## Layer 0 — Protocol Traits

- [layer0](layer0/): Protocol traits (Turn, Orchestrator, StateStore, Environment), message types, and cross-cutting interfaces (Hook, Lifecycle). This is the stability contract for the entire workspace.

## Layer 1 — Turn Implementations

- [neuron-turn](neuron-turn/): Turn provider abstraction and trait.
- [neuron-context](neuron-context/): Conversation context management.
- [neuron-tool](neuron-tool/): Tool registry, ToolDyn trait, and middleware.
- [neuron-mcp](neuron-mcp/): Model Context Protocol client.
- [neuron-provider-anthropic](neuron-provider-anthropic/): Anthropic provider.
- [neuron-provider-openai](neuron-provider-openai/): OpenAI provider.
- [neuron-provider-ollama](neuron-provider-ollama/): Ollama provider.
- [neuron-op-react](neuron-op-react/): ReAct operator.
- [neuron-op-single-shot](neuron-op-single-shot/): Single-shot operator.

## Layer 2 — Orchestration

- [neuron-orch-local](neuron-orch-local/): Local orchestrator (in-process multi-agent).
- [neuron-orch-kit](neuron-orch-kit/): Orchestration utilities.

## Layer 3 — State

- [neuron-state-memory](neuron-state-memory/): In-memory state store.
- [neuron-state-fs](neuron-state-fs/): Filesystem state store.

## Layer 4 — Environment

- [neuron-env-local](neuron-env-local/): Local environment (credentials, sandbox).
- [neuron-secret](neuron-secret/): Secret trait.
- [neuron-secret-env](neuron-secret-env/): Environment variable secrets.
- [neuron-secret-vault](neuron-secret-vault/): HashiCorp Vault secrets.
- [neuron-secret-aws](neuron-secret-aws/): AWS Secrets Manager.
- [neuron-secret-gcp](neuron-secret-gcp/): GCP Secret Manager.
- [neuron-secret-keystore](neuron-secret-keystore/): OS keystore secrets.
- [neuron-secret-k8s](neuron-secret-k8s/): Kubernetes secrets.
- [neuron-auth](neuron-auth/): Authentication trait.
- [neuron-auth-static](neuron-auth-static/): Static auth.
- [neuron-auth-file](neuron-auth-file/): File-based auth.
- [neuron-auth-oidc](neuron-auth-oidc/): OIDC auth.
- [neuron-auth-k8s](neuron-auth-k8s/): Kubernetes auth.
- [neuron-crypto](neuron-crypto/): Cryptography trait.
- [neuron-crypto-vault](neuron-crypto-vault/): Vault crypto backend.
- [neuron-crypto-hardware](neuron-crypto-hardware/): Hardware crypto backend.

## Layer 5 — Cross-Cutting

- [neuron-hooks](neuron-hooks/): Hook registry and lifecycle coordination.
- [neuron-hook-security](neuron-hook-security/): Security hooks.

## Umbrella Crate

- [neuron](neuron/): Re-exports everything with feature flags. Single dependency for downstream consumers.
